passives.desc: Turn Start: Gain or lose 2 [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack based on Battleform of the Homeland on self (does not activate in the first turn of the Encounter) - [ChoiSwordsmanshipOne]: Gain Stack - [ChoiSwordsmanshipMany]: Lose Stack In the turn where this unit equipped Envy Skills, this unit will not be affected by [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack adjustment effects, and will reset [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack to 5 next turn
passives.name: Swordplay of the Homeland [Sal] - Shift Battleform

passives.desc: Take -30% damage from [Combustion], [Laceration], [Vibration], [Burst], [Sinking] (rounded down) Gain the effects of [PanicChangeLock]; If this unit is Panicked at Turn End, reset SP to 45 Turn Start: Gain the following effects: - When in [ChoiSwordsmanshipOne]: At less than 5 [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack, gain (5 - [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack) [Vulnerable] - When in [ChoiSwordsmanshipMany]: At more than 5 [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack, gain [Vulnerable] equal to surplus [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack past 5
passives.name: Dujeong Brigandine [Sal] - Great Mountain

passives.desc:
Encounter Start: Gain 5 [ChoiSwordsmanship]

Assume a different Battleform of the Homeland every 3 turns

On Hit using a Slash Skill, gain 1 [Breath] Potency (once per Skill)

When the following conditions are met, use a pattern that includes the "Bow of the Homeland - Arrowloose" Skill
- When this unit lost all Clashes for 2 turns in a row (does not check for Unopposed Attacks)
- Turn after Stagger
- When in Low Morale or Panic

Turn Start: At Min or Max [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stacks, use a powerful Skill
If this unit used the "Bow of the Homeland - Arrowloose" Skill in the last turn, use a powerful Skill regardless of [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack on self
At 55% or lower HP, use a powerful Skill regardless of [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack on self
passives.name: Swordplay of the Homeland [Sal] - Rend Flesh from Flesh

passives.desc:

If the target this unit's Skill hit has less than 5 [Laceration] Potency, inflict 1 [Laceration] and +2 [Laceration] Count at Attack End (once per Skill, 2 times per turn, prioritize the main target)
